title: How does NERV know how many angels there are
display_title: How does NERV know how many angels there are
wikitext:
[]: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Wed May 31, 2023 9:38 am Presumably, the First Ancestral Race spread seeds of Life and Knowledge across the galaxy, the ones that landed on Earth weren't the only ones. Since the angels that attack are all Adam derived and appear from space, seems reasonable that they're derived from (a) seed(s) of Life elsewhere in the galaxy. That being the case, how does NERV know they've killed all angels? Couldn't there be thousands or even millions of them throughout the Milky Way? Come to think of it, there are probably also other Lilan civilizations out there...

[]: Re: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by MsenjaKagami » Wed May 31, 2023 11:58 am Do you remember this thing that kept getting mentioned throughout the series (or at least early on) called the Dead Sea Scrolls

[]: Re: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Wed May 31, 2023 12:30 pm MsenjaKagami wrote: Do you remember this thing that kept getting mentioned throughout the series (or at least early on) called the Dead Sea Scrolls

[]: Re: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by MG2005 » Tue Jun 06, 2023 1:35 pm Asunji_Yuko wrote: Presumably, the First Ancestral Race spread seeds of Life and Knowledge across the galaxy, the ones that landed on Earth weren't the only ones. Since the angels that attack are all Adam derived and appear from space, seems reasonable that they're derived from (a) seed(s) of Life elsewhere in the galaxy. That being the case, how does NERV know they've killed all angels? Couldn't there be thousands or even millions of them throughout the Milky Way? Come to think of it, there are probably also other Lilan civilizations out there...

[]: Re: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by Sefirot Tree Of Life » Wed Jun 07, 2023 4:54 pm I believe Gendo and SEELE know how many Angels there are. It is possible that Fuyutsuki and Yui do as well. Outside of that, I do not think anyone else in NERV, not even Ritsuko, knows the truth. Gendo and SEELE I think are the only ones who know about the Dead Sea Scrolls. Misato was out of the loop and didn't even know Lilith was in NERV's basement. If Misato doesn't know, I doubt anyone else aside from Gendo and maybe Ritsuko knows. Everyone else at NERV was sworn to confidentiality and a need to know basis. I think the average NERV employee just thought they'd be killing Angels forever.

[]: Re: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by at1vanhal3n » Fri Sep 01, 2023 8:20 pm I think the average NERV employee just thought they'd be killing Angels forever.

[]: Re: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Sep 01, 2023 10:40 pm It's early on in EoE, yeah

[]: Re: How does NERV know how many angels there are?             Quote Post by bulwhark » Mon Sep 04, 2023 9:59 am at1vanhal3n wrote: I think the average NERV employee just thought they'd be killing Angels forever.
